networkError: Can't reach the server. Check your internet connection.
serverError: The server ran into a problem. Please try again shortly.
notFound: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
unauthorized: You need to sign in to continue.
sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
unsupportedFileType: That file type is not supported.
unknownError: Something unexpected happened. Please try again.
